title: Amethyst Overload
description: Adds a bunch of decorative blocks made from amethyst
body:
# About the mod
**Amethyst Overload** is a mod that adds various blocks related to amethyst 

**Amethyst** is an amazing decorating material but vanilla minecraft lacks the diversity that this mod is aiming to achieve

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22471c7e1acefba4385c1358adec3604bf062f00.png)
# Features
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1096060/description_db9b51b0-b883-4063-9e2c-9dce1f925df3.png)

## Redstone update:
Two blocks have been added! 
- Amethyst Lamp
- Amethyst Sensor

**Amethyst lamp** is self-explanatory, here it is ingame:

![Amethyst lamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2e193842359824fefa35d31eab95b63dd20d44d.png)

But the main block of the update is of course the **Amethyst sensor**, so what does it do?

Sensor is constantly scanning two blocks above it for any entity, and outputs a signal when it detects one.

![Sensor detect range](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16cdde0bda7b663b4de384cd986c20ed43fd8496.png)

But it would be a bad version of a pressure plate if it was this plain, so the sensor detects entities through blocks!

![Sensor detect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/396a01a3bdf3a2339749fbb25d2cac6ff607ef8e.png)

We are thrilled to see what contraptions you can build with this one!

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22471c7e1acefba4385c1358adec3604bf062f00.png)
# Roadmap
Mod is very early in development and there is a ton of things that are being worked on! If you have any suggestions or criticism, feel free to contact me!

**Fabric and other versions?** not while the mod is being heavily developed, but I am considering porting it to farbic and other minecraft versions.
